web_development.title: Web Development
web_development.description: Responsive websites and practical web applications for small businesses, professional services, and internal teams.
list: Responsive website design
Front-end development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React
CMS and e-commerce integration with WordPress and OpenCart
UX cleanup and interface refinement
Cross-browser compatibility
SEO and performance optimization

backend_development.title: Backend Development
backend_development.description: Reliable backend systems for APIs, data workflows, authentication, and business operations.
list: Server-side development with PHP, Node.js, Java, and Python
Database design for MySQL, MongoDB, and Microsoft SQL Server
REST API design and implementation
Authentication and authorization workflows

full_stack_solutions.title: Full-Stack Solutions
full_stack_solutions.description: End-to-end delivery for business applications that need both clean interfaces and solid backend logic.
list: Custom web application development
Project planning, implementation, and deployment support
Database design and query optimization
Security improvements and bug fixes
Real-time data and messaging features
Custom feature extensions for existing systems

go_training.title: Go Training
go_training.description: Structured Go lessons for players who want practical improvement through review, fundamentals, and game planning.
list: 6-dan AGA and 5-dan China level training
Certified National Second-Level Referee
Personalized sessions from beginner to advanced level
Game reviews, strategy, and technique improvement
Online or in-person scheduling
go_training.closing: Lessons can focus on fundamentals, tournament preparation, reviewing your games, or building a long-term study plan.

ai_development.title: AI-Assisted Development
ai_development.description: Development workflows that use AI tools carefully to move faster while keeping code review and engineering judgment in the loop.
list: AI-assisted implementation and review with Claude Code and ChatGPT
Prompt workflows for repetitive development tasks
Faster feature delivery with structured AI support
Debugging and code optimization with AI tooling
AI workflow consulting for development teams

web_development.title: 网站与前端开发
web_development.description: 为小型企业、专业服务团队和内部业务场景开发响应式网站与实用型 Web 应用。
list: 响应式网站设计
使用 HTML、CSS、JavaScript 和 React 进行前端开发
WordPress 与 OpenCart 等 CMS / 电商系统集成
用户体验梳理与界面优化
跨浏览器兼容性处理
SEO 与页面性能优化

backend_development.title: 后端开发
backend_development.description: 构建可靠的后端系统，覆盖 API、数据流程、身份认证和业务逻辑。
list: 使用 PHP、Node.js、Java 和 Python 进行服务端开发
MySQL、MongoDB 和 Microsoft SQL Server 数据库设计
REST API 设计与实现
用户认证与权限控制流程

full_stack_solutions.title: 全栈解决方案
full_stack_solutions.description: 为需要界面、后端和数据能力协同工作的业务应用提供端到端交付。
list: 定制 Web 应用开发
项目规划、实现与部署支持
数据库设计与查询优化
安全性改进与问题修复
实时数据与消息功能
既有系统的定制功能扩展

go_training.title: 围棋培训
go_training.description: 通过复盘、基础训练和对局规划，为希望稳定提升的棋手提供结构化围棋课程。
list: AGA 6 段、中国 5 段水平训练
国家二级裁判员认证
面向初学者到高段棋手的个性化课程
对局复盘、战略思维和技术提升
支持线上或线下课程安排
go_training.closing: 课程可围绕基础训练、比赛准备、个人棋谱复盘或长期学习计划展开。

ai_development.title: AI 辅助开发
ai_development.description: 将 AI 工具谨慎融入开发流程，在保留代码审查和工程判断的前提下提升交付效率。
list: 使用 Claude Code 和 ChatGPT 辅助实现与代码审查
为重复开发任务设计 Prompt 工作流
通过结构化 AI 支持加速功能交付
利用 AI 工具进行调试与代码优化
为开发团队提供 AI 工作流咨询
